CustomField.formula: IF( IR35_Tool_Sign_Up__c, 0.25, 0) + IF( TEXT(Insurance_Mandate__c) = "Blocker to placement" || TEXT(Insurance_Mandate__c) = "Blocker to payment",0.20,0) + IF( Perfect_Paragraph_Implemented__c ,0.20,0) + IF( Renewal_paragraph_implemented__c ,0.10,0) + IF( IR35_Protect_Blocker__c || Recruiter_Protect__c ,0.15,0) + IF( Referring__c ,0.10,0)
CustomField.label: Partner Score
